overridesComments.fast-uri: Close 2 transitive CVEs reaching us via MCP SDK: GHSA-q3j6-qgpj-74h6 (path traversal via percent-encoded dot segments, vulnerable <=3.1.0, patched >=3.1.1) and GHSA-v39h-62p7-jpjc (host confusion via percent-encoded authority delimiters, vulnerable <=3.1.1, patched >=3.1.2). Constraint is ^3.1.2 (not ^3.0.0) because pnpm overrides do not force re-resolution when the existing locked version satisfies the range — a looser ^3.0.0 would let the pre-existing 3.1.0 stay locked. Drop this override once the MCP SDK parent dep upgrades past the vulnerable range and pnpm naturally resolves to a non-vulnerable version. Tracked in #223.
